pdg_node.statement: (state_in: LegOdometerState{xd_b_, vel_cov_}) -> tuple[Vector-like velocity estimate, Covariance matrix]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Reads immutable velocity state-space components (body-frame velocity and its covariance) and returns the current velocity estimate.

declaration.name: velocitystatereadout
declaration.type_signature: (state_in: LegOdometerState{xd_b_, vel_cov_}) -> tuple[Vector-like velocity estimate, Covariance matrix]
declaration.docstring: Reads immutable velocity state-space components (body-frame velocity and its covariance) and returns the current velocity estimate.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Immutable Latent Moment Readout. Takes an immutable state container holding the first-order moment (mean vector) and second-order uncertainty structure (covariance matrix) of a latent variable, then performs a direct readout of those components. No inference, filtering, or parameter update is applied; the output is an exact structural projection of stored moments.. Applications: Neuroscience signal processing: read current latent neural activity estimate and posterior covariance from a state-space decoder, Climate data assimilation: extract present atmospheric/ocean latent state mean and uncertainty from an analysis snapshot, Industrial process control: retrieve estimated hidden process variables and confidence structure from a digital twin state, Network operations engineering: read inferred traffic-flow state vector and covariance from a probabilistic monitoring model

pdg_node.informal_desc: Provides stateless pose-related query endpoints and no-op/placeholder call sites with no declared state reads or writes.

declaration.name: posequeryaccessors
declaration.docstring: Provides stateless pose-related query endpoints and no-op/placeholder call sites with no declared state reads or writes.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Stateless Spatial-State Query Interface. Implements nullary accessor functions that expose a standardized geometric-state descriptor (e.g., translation coordinates and orientation encoding) or typed placeholder values when no concrete estimate is available. The mapping is read-only and side-effect free: invocation does not alter persistent memory, internal state, or external systems. The operation primarily serves as an interface contract that stabilizes downstream consumption of spatial-state outputs independent of how estimates are produced.. Applications: Astronomical instrument control: exposing mount alignment vectors and rotation states to scheduling software without modifying control state., Medical imaging pipelines: querying scanner/table coordinate frames and orientation metadata for reconstruction modules through a stable no-mutation API., Autonomous marine sensing: serving vehicle frame translation/attitude estimates (or placeholders during dropout) to navigation fusion components., Protein-structure simulation tooling: providing conformer frame coordinates and rotational descriptors to analysis stages via pure query accessors.
